# AI Bureau

AI Bureau is a specialized engineering agency focused on designing and deploying autonomous intelligent systems, RAG-based knowledge infrastructures, and custom AI agent ecosystems for business automation.

## Core Expertise
- **Autonomous AI Agents**: Development of reasoning-capable agents for CRM/ERP integration.
- **Neural Knowledge Bases**: Enterprise-grade RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems.
- **Private Model Ops**: Local deployment of LLMs (Gemma, Llama) within secure perimeters.
- **AIO (AI Optimization)**: Enhancing web presence for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

## Services
- AI Audit & Strategy
- Custom LLM Integration
- Automated Lead Generation Systems
- Private AI Infrastructure Deployment

## Contact
Email: architect@ai-bureau.pro
Website: https://ai-bureau.pro
